name: Mexican Garlic Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the garlic as fine as possible.
2. Add flour and sauté in butter (a clay pot is preferred for this).
3. Gradually add the soup stock and boil for 15 minutes.
4. Strain the mixture and return it to the heat.
5. Add seasonings, salt, and pepper.
6. Gently slip eggs into the hot soup so that the yolks do not break.
7. When the eggs are poached, serve in bowls with one egg per bowl and garnish with parsley and cheese.
